meaning: adj.可尊敬的,教士的,(对牧师的尊称,前面与the连用)尊敬的n.教士,牧师
examples: The Reverend Chris Long led the prayers and pronounced the blessing.
During the Washington meeting, Reverend Jackson called for a return to family values.
"People go at the special times—Christmas, Easter, and baptisms, weddings, funerals," notes the Reverend Christina Berglund.
National Association of Viewers and Listeners president, the Reverend Graham Stevens, warned against making hasty changes.
The first recipient was the former Bishop of Truro, the Right Reverend Bill Ind.
